query:
SELECT 
  oi.productName,
  DATE(o.createdAt) as orderDate,
  DAYNAME(o.createdAt) as dayName,
  SUM(oi.quantity) as totalQty
FROM order_items oi
JOIN orders o ON oi.orderId = o.id
JOIN products p ON oi.productId = p.id
JOIN subcategories sc ON p.subcategoryId = sc.id
WHERE sc.categoryId = 4
  AND o.orderStatus != 'cancelled'
  AND oi.status = 'active'
  AND o.isTestData = 0
  AND oi.productName LIKE '%Biang%'
  AND o.createdAt >= '2026-01-01'
GROUP BY oi.productName, DATE(o.createdAt), DAYNAME(o.createdAt)
ORDER BY DATE(o.createdAt)
LIMIT 50;

  DATE(o.createdAt) as orderDate,
  DAYNAME(o.createdAt) as dayName,
  SUM(oi.quantity) as totalQty
FROM order_items oi
JOIN orders o ON oi.orderId = o.id
JOIN products p ON oi.productId = p.id
JOIN subcategories sc ON p.subcategoryId = sc.id
WHERE sc.categoryId = 4
  AND o.orderStatus != 'cancelled'
  AND oi.status = 'active'
  AND o.isTestData = 0
  AND oi.productName LIKE '%Biang%'
  AND o.createdAt >= '2026-01-01'
GROUP BY oi.productName, DATE(o.createdAt), DAYNAME(o.createdAt)
ORDER BY DATE(o.createdAt)
LIMIT 50;
